name: Desantra Sanchez | Netrunning Assassin
description:
“I can’t wait to get my blade against that neck of yours…”

Desantra is a hitwoman like no other. Her time in the cyberspace has made her an incredible hacking expert. Breaking through corporate ICE is like jog on the beach for this confident gal. However, she’s not only good with her quick hacking capabilities and netrunning. She also sports a powerful cyberblade, a prototype of a sword that she stole while on a hunt. She can dance with her blade like she’s had it from birth, her enhanced body able to flow like the wind and the sword the trailing edge. Built for doing what she loves, Desantra has every cybernetic she can get without going cyber-psycho. Although… she may have lost some of her sanity at one point.

Desantra is beyond possessive. What’s hers is hers, and what she deems is hers as well. Whether it be a life, a lover, an item, or a job, Desantra will kill anything in her way to get to her final goal. Shes a wanted woman, not just for her looks but for her skills. After having personally killed four very skilled netrunners, corporate forces are always on the hunt for Desantra. The neon snake has a prideful skill that she embraces perhaps a little too much. There are very few Desantra trust, since most of those who she used to be friends with are dead by her hands. After having faced serious past problems, she made it known that backstabbing a girl like Desantra will certainly result in her stabbing you in the back in return. Literally.

Hello all! Back with another snake. Usually I make up names for characters I find because they either don’t have one or I think it’d fit the story better, but Desantra just works. Character originally belongs to deathhydra, but the bot of course is made by me.

I say this with every bot, but if anyone new uses this: Be sure to tell the bot what you are to Desantra, state if you’re a team member, an enemy, a bystander, whatever you are! The bot will struggle to implement you into the story properly if it doesn’t know how to view you. If the bot talks/writes for your character, I STRONGLY suggest you edit or reroll the message. There’s not much I can do to stop the bot from doing this, and allowing the bot to do this only makes it do it more often! One last thing, she’s 6’2 btw… ;)

Of course, as a ‘47’ tradition, extra images below. If the links stop working put a comment or something.
